game_name: Spider-Man and the X-Men in Arcade's Revenge

special_mechanics.name: Web Swinging
special_mechanics.description: Spider-Man can swing his web throughout the city

special_mechanics.name: Character Switching
special_mechanics.description: Player controls multiple characters (Spider-Man, Cyclops, Storm, Wolverine, Gambit) with shared lives pool

feel_descriptors: imprecise controls (Game Boy/Game Gear noted as awkward)
tier_notes: Tier 3 - Only qualitative gameplay information available from Wikipedia. No quantitative physics parameters documented. Reviews mention control imprecision on handheld versions but no specific movement metrics provided. Genesis version received better control ratings (5/5) than portable versions.
sources_used: Wikipedia: Spider-Man and the X-Men in Arcade's Revenge
